Notice Of Motion To Compel Pltf'S Responses To Deft'S Discovery Requests; Compel Deposition Attendance; Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-14-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Defendant Kelly Martin's Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Responses To Defendant's Discovery Requests, To Compel Deposition Attendance is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond and failure to appear for deposition were misuses of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond to the form interrogatories and request for documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Plaintiff is further ordered to appear for his deposition, to be noticed by Defendant, and to complete his deposition no later than October 23, 2009. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $531.84, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
